brief_html: This packet requests the filetime of the specified file. The second field appears to always be null.
remarks_html:
This packet requests the filetime of the specified file. The second field appears to always be null.

Known Request ID Values

Value File
0x01 tos_usa.txt
0x03 bnserver-WAR3.ini
0x1A tos_USA.txt
0x1B bnserver.ini
0x1D icons_STAR.bni
0x80000004 bnserver-D2DV.ini
0x80000005 [0x4A] IX86ExtraWork.mpq
0x80000006 [0x4C] IX86ExtraWork.mpq

comments.content_html: Just for the record, the request ID is more like a cookie and the given values are just what the client at some point was seen using... they aren't actually required to be set that way to make the request.
